title: Genre Guide: Pop
content: Pop music emphasizes memorable melodies, concise song structures, and broad accessibility. Modern pop often blends electronic production, R&B rhythms, and songwriting influenced by social media culture.

title: Genre Guide: Hip-Hop
content: Hip-hop prioritizes rhythm, lyrical delivery, and production identity. Contemporary hip-hop ranges from conscious rap and storytelling to trap-inspired high-energy records built around heavy bass and dynamic drums.

title: Genre Guide: R&B
content: R&B combines expressive vocals, groove-focused rhythms, and emotional themes. Modern R&B frequently overlaps with soul, pop, and hip-hop while retaining vocal texture and intimate writing.

title: Genre Guide: Indie Rock
content: Indie rock emphasizes personal songwriting and experimentation outside mainstream pop formulas. Production can range from lo-fi guitar textures to polished art-pop arrangements.

title: Genre Guide: Dance-Pop
content: Dance-pop is designed for momentum and movement, with strong four-on-the-floor rhythms, bright synths, and chorus-first structures. It is ideal for party, workout, and confidence-focused playlists.

title: Genre Guide: Reggaeton
content: Reggaeton centers around dembow rhythm patterns and Latin Caribbean influence. The genre commonly blends melodic hooks, rap-influenced verses, and energetic production suited for social environments.

title: Genre Guide: Folk Pop
content: Folk pop merges acoustic storytelling with accessible pop structures. Lyrics often focus on personal growth, place, and memory, making it effective for reflective and calm playlist themes.

title: Genre Guide: Alternative Pop
content: Alternative pop pushes beyond traditional radio formulas by mixing unusual production textures with pop songwriting. Artists often shift between styles across records, balancing experimentation and hooks.

title: Mood Mapping Basics
content: For chill moods, pick lower energy tracks between 3 and 5 with warm vocals or atmospheric synths. For workout moods, target energy 8 to 10 with strong percussive drive. For reflective moods, prioritize lyrical depth and moderate tempos.

title: If You Like Taylor Swift
content: If you like Taylor Swift's narrative lyricism and emotional detail, try Olivia Rodrigo for younger pop-rock perspective, Kacey Musgraves for country-pop storytelling, and Gracie Abrams for intimate writing style.

title: If You Like The Weeknd
content: If you like The Weeknd's nocturnal R&B and synth textures, try Frank Ocean for artful writing, Miguel for groove-heavy vocals, and Dua Lipa's darker pop cuts for dance-ready but moody production.

title: If You Like Kendrick Lamar
content: If you like Kendrick Lamar's lyrical craft and social framing, try J. Cole for introspection, Vince Staples for concise storytelling, and Saba for emotionally grounded writing.

title: If You Like Phoebe Bridgers
content: If you like Phoebe Bridgers' reflective songwriting, try Lucy Dacus for narrative detail, Julien Baker for emotional intensity, and Adrianne Lenker for sparse acoustic intimacy.

title: Playlist Theme: Workout
content: Workout playlists should maintain momentum. Favor high-energy songs with strong drum patterns, punchy bass, and confident vocal delivery. Prioritize dance-pop, trap, and upbeat hip-hop selections.

title: Playlist Theme: Study Focus
content: Study playlists work best with stable dynamics and low distraction. Choose chill R&B, mellow indie electronic, and instrumental-friendly pop tracks at moderate to low energy levels.

title: Playlist Theme: Late Night Drive
content: Late night drive playlists should feel cinematic and immersive. Blend moody synth-pop, atmospheric hip-hop, and reflective indie tracks with smooth transitions.

title: Playlist Theme: Party Starter
content: Party playlists need immediate hooks and dance momentum. Prioritize high-energy reggaeton, dance-pop, and mainstream hip-hop with recognizable choruses.

title: Playlist Theme: Rainy Day
content: Rainy day playlists emphasize introspection and warmth. Use melancholic indie rock, slow R&B, and acoustic pop songs with emotional clarity.

title: Artist Snapshot: SZA
content: SZA blends R&B with alternative textures and candid writing about vulnerability, confidence, and emotional ambiguity. Her catalog works for chill, reflective, and moody listening contexts.

title: Artist Snapshot: Tame Impala
content: Tame Impala is known for psychedelic synth layers, groovy basslines, and introspective themes. Tracks often fit late-night, reflective, and chill playlists with moderate energy.
